name: graphic-design-production
description: Graphic design production skills for clarifying rough briefs and auditing delivery files.

interface.shortDescription: Clarify graphic briefs and audit delivery files.
interface.longDescription: A local plugin for computer graphic designers who use Photoshop and Illustrator. It separates creative brief clarification from practical delivery-file auditing so each skill stays focused.
defaultPrompt: Use $graphic-brief-production to organize this rough design idea.
Use $graphic-delivery-audit to inspect this delivery folder.
